title: Filipino Fish Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful Filipino-inspired fish soup made with fresh fish and vegetables.

ingredients.name: Fish (any white fish)
ingredients.notes: Fresh and sustainable, cut into bite-sized pieces

ingredients.name: Fatty (such as coconut milk)
ingredients.notes: Canned or carton, full-fat for added richness

ingredients.name: Tingly (such as ginger)
ingredients.notes: Fresh and grated, adds warmth and depth

ingredients.name: Filipino (such as patis)
ingredients.notes: Fish sauce, adds umami flavor and depth

ingredients.name: Soup (such as chicken broth)
ingredients.notes: Low-sodium and gluten-free, or use vegetable broth for a vegetarian option

ingredients.name: Tomato
ingredients.notes: Diced and added to the soup for sweetness

ingredients.name: Parsley
ingredients.notes: Chopped and added as a garnish

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add ginger and fish sauce and cook for an additional minute.
Add fish and cook until opaque and cooked through, about 3-4 minutes.
Add coconut milk and chicken broth, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let soup simmer for 5-7 minutes.
Add diced tomato and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
